creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Please send this information to freebsd-questions@freebsd.org. You've covered 
most of the bases, but you should also include whether your conflicts were 
all resolved when you finished the configure for the 4.4 install. Also, 
have you changed anything in your BIOS settings between the two installs? 
Specifically related to the PnP options? 

Good luck, 

Doug
